free_text: Investigation of large angle structure in alpha-
scattering from calcium isotopes between Ea = 36-61 MeV
Variable energy cyclotron of the KVI
Six surface barrier detectors with angular
distance of 8 degrees were mounted on a rotatable ring.
mu-g/cm2 and 1500 mu-g/cm2 were used as targets.
The statistical errors of the elastic scattering data
are on the average less than 5% except for cross
sections lower than 10 mu-b/sr when the uncertainties
rise up to 20% for the higher energy. The overall
energy resolution in the spectra was about 250 keV at
forward angles and 350 keV at backward angles.
